title: 3 Morning Habits That Change Your Body

segments.text: The first hour of your day decides your energy.
And most people waste it on their phone.
Get sunlight in your eyes soon after waking up.
It helps set your body clock and your mood.
Drink a glass of water before your coffee.
Small habits, repeated daily, change everything.
Follow for daily tips your body will thank you for.

description: Win the first hour, win the day. Follow for daily health tips!

title: 3 Simple Habits for a Longer Life

segments.text: The longest-living people share a few simple habits.
And none of them involve a gym membership.
They move gently all day, not just once.
They eat mostly plants and stop before they're full.
And they stay close to friends and family.
Connection may matter as much as diet.
Follow for daily tips your body will thank you for.

description: The longest-living people keep it simple. Follow for daily health tips!

title: Why You're Always Tired

segments.text: Always tired? It might not be sleep at all.
And the real reasons surprise most people.
Dehydration drains your energy fast.
So does scrolling your phone late at night.
And skipping daylight keeps your body confused.
Fix the basics and your energy comes back.
Follow for daily tips your body will thank you for.

description: Always tired? The fix is simpler than you think. Follow for daily health tips!
